name: German Chocolate Cake Mix Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package of German Chocolate Cake Mix (with pudding included)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, chocolate chips, rolled oats, raisins, and oil.
3. Add the eggs and stir until well blended.
4. Scoop the dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them about two inches apart.
5. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until set.
6. Allow cookies to cool for one minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
